seoTitle: Lundavra vs Luscombe — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lundavra and Luscombe. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lundavra and Luscombe.
heading: Lundavra vs Luscombe — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lundavra, Queensland and Luscombe, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Luscombe has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Lundavra (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lundavra or Luscombe safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lundavra has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Luscombe scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lundavra scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Luscombe scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lundavra or Luscombe?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Luscombe has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
